ccel.title: NPNF1-02. St. Augustine's City of God and Christian Doctrine

source.title: NPNF1-02. St. Augustine's City of God and Christian Doctrine
NPNF1-02. St. Augustine's City of God and Christian Doctrine

verses.text: Whatever, then, is in accordance with the habits of those with whom we are either compelled by necessity, or undertake as a matter of duty, to spend this life, is to be turned by good and great men to some prudent or benevolent end, either directly, as is our duty, or figuratively, as is allowable to prophets.
